name: Luis Elizondo Leaves the Pentagon and Begins Public UAP Advocacy
summary: In October 2017, Luis Elizondo resigned from his Defense Department position, citing the need for greater public exposure and government cooperation in the study of UAP, and subsequently became a prominent public advocate on the issue.

relationships.context: Left government service and began public UAP advocacy
Former employer and setting of the resignation
Public exposure and cooperation on UAP investigation

referenceSources.label: Galileo Project biography and affiliate announcement
